reference: Hi, I am a fifteen-year-old male. There is a bone that sticks out from just under my stomach, and it has been there for as long as I can remember. It sticks out a lot when I am in the deep end of a swimming pool or when I am doing sit-ups. Is there a way to stop this?
text: Hi, I am a fifteen-year-old male. There is a bone that sticks out from just under my stomach, and it has been there for as long as I can remember. It sticks out a lot when I am in the deep end of a swimming pool or when I am doing sit-ups. Is there a way to stop this?
